titleStmt.title: SII 7.203: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 203. (A.R. No. 34 of 1901). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ . jīyāttrailōkyanā
thasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . svasti . śakavarṣa 1384 neya viṣusaṁvatsarada puṣya śu 1 budhavāra mūlanakṣatradalli śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvaraṁ nagireya hiriya bhairavadēvavoḍeyaru nagirarājyava pratipālisuttamirddalli tamage vyā
dhi balōttaravādalli tamage paramagatige sādhanavāgi taṁma trikaraṇaśuddhiyiṁda tamage puṇyārtthavāgi bidireya tribhuvana cūḍāmaṇiyeṁba caityālayada śrīcaṁdranāthasvāmigaḷa pūrvvāhṇakālada dēvapūjegeyū naḍu
vaṇa neleya śrīsupārśvatīrtthaṁkarara madhyāhnakālada dēvapūjegeyū mēgaṇa neleya śrīcaṁdraprabhatīrtthakara madhyāhnakālada dēvapūjegeyū taṁma taṁmaṁdiru bhairarasaru Aṁbirāyarasaru mukhyavāda samasta taṁma kuṭuṁbavarggada
vara Anumatiyiṁda beḷuguḷada paṁḍitadēvarugaḷu modalāda saṁghasamudāyadavara muṁdiṭṭu barasida dharmmaśāsanada bhāṣākramaveṁteṁdare [.] tāvu Āḷuttayirdda ballaseya nālku gaḍiyiṁda voḷagaṇa samastavṛttige kaṭṭida gēṇi
ya Oḷage Aramanege Aḷava gēṇiya hāneyalu mūḍe 1 kkaṁ hāne 30 lekkadalu bhattada mūḍe 1000 sāvira mūḍeyanu varṣaṁ prati naḍasuvaṁtāgi hiraṇyōdaka dhārāporvvakavāgi Ā caṁdrārkkasthāIyāgi māḍidaṁthā dharmmaśāsana Idu .
Digital edition of SII 7.203 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
